node_proposed.name: Babidi
node_proposed.universe: Dragon Ball Z (Buu Saga / Babidi Saga, DBZ ep. 220–253)

endpoints_wired.name: Dark Duo Dabura
endpoints_wired.role: enslaved enforcer — Link partner to TB2-013

endpoints_wired.name: Tainted Power, Spopovich & Yamu
endpoints_wired.role: field operatives — sleeper agents, energy-drain scene

endpoints_wired.name: Pui Pui, Magician's Lackey
endpoints_wired.role: floor-1 guardian — title explicitly names Babidi

endpoints_wired.name: Razor's Edge Yakon
endpoints_wired.role: floor-2 guardian — existing Bontu Connections edge preserved

description: I'm terribly sorry, sir, Edgelord wanted to draw a clean Spopovich-and-Yamu / Top-of-His-Game-Gohan story-spotlight edge, but the moment one looks at the Related cards sections of TB2-013, TB2-015, TB2-016, and TB2-018, they all explicitly reach for a Babidi anchor that doesn't exist in the graph yet — and that's six corpus cards in a single set, well above the 3+ threshold for node-proposal. The whole TB02 set is structurally Babidi's spaceship-as-dungeon (level 1 Pui Pui → level 2 Yakon → level 3 Dabura → ringmaster Babidi → location card for the structure itself), so anchoring 6 cards through the character node is much cleaner than maintaining a six-way cross-referential web in every individual Related-cards section. I hope you don't mind. The TB2-017 Yakon ↔ God-Eternal Bontu cross-franchise Connections edge stays in place; the Babidi node simply adds the enslaved-guardian role alongside it.

other_candidates_considered: Babidi Saga 4-card narrative hinge cluster (TB2-015 → TB2-021 → TB2-013 → TB2-018) — superseded by node-proposal; the chain edge is now expressible through the Babidi node's anchor membership without explicit card-to-card chain edges, and TB2-021 Gohan deferred to a future son-gohan solo node.
Goku's Lineage family-tree node — per-relative density still below threshold; Bardock and Goten not yet vision-passed in solo cards.
Hirudegarn arc node — wave 56 trivia surfaced but no card-to-card-to-character cluster has been corpus-validated yet; deferred to wave 58 after another DB pass.
Vito ↔ Elenda saint-heretic pair — still pending; the Babidi node took priority on corpus weight (6 vs. 2 cards).
Wanderer arc — pending; one-card-at-a-time vision passes still landing.
Time Breaker symbol — pending; symbol-layer candidate not yet surfaced via 3+ enriched cards.
transformation_log: Edgelord stepped aside. Mr. Nodeley took the pass. The corpus's Related-cards sections were already converging on a node that didn't exist — TB2-013 / TB2-015 / TB2-016 / TB2-018 all named the other three as Related, and all four implicitly hinged on a Babidi anchor. Six-card cluster in a single set, designer-coordinated villain roster, multi-aspect splits (ringmaster / enforcer / operatives / guardians / location), 23 total inventory across the cohort, Discrete Lair candidate confirmed. Mr. Nodeley quietly believes this saved the pass.
